1.title: ContactFlowErrors Sum (by ContactFlowName and MetricGroup)
1.query:
timeseries contact_flow_errors_sum_by_contact_flow_name_metric_group = avg(cloud.aws.connect.contact_flow_errors_sum_by_contact_flow_name_metric_group),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(contact_flow_errors_sum_by_contact_flow_name_metric_group) desc
| limit 20

2.title: QueueSize (by MetricGroup and QueueName)
2.query:
timeseries queue_size_by_metric_group_queue_name = avg(cloud.aws.connect.queue_size_by_metric_group_queue_name),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(queue_size_by_metric_group_queue_name) desc
| limit 20

3.title: LongestQueueWaitTime (by MetricGroup and QueueName)
3.query:
timeseries longest_queue_wait_time_by_metric_group_queue_name = avg(cloud.aws.connect.longest_queue_wait_time_by_metric_group_queue_name),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(longest_queue_wait_time_by_metric_group_queue_name) desc
| limit 20
